summary: Completed testing of TrustLens Signal Strength Summary feature. Backend: 9/9 pytest tests passed - GET /api/analysis/{session_id}/results endpoint correctly returns signal_strength_summary field with strong/moderate/weak arrays and total_signals count. Each signal has required fields (key, name, desc, intensity, strength, explanation). Signal categorization verified: strong>=0.55, moderate 0.25-0.55, weak<0.25. Signal descriptions use non-accusatory pattern-based language. Frontend: Code review confirmed ResultsDashboard.jsx has correct implementation - stage 6 reveals Signal Strength Summary section with proper data-testid attributes, color-coded tiers (red #FF4D6D, amber #FCA311, green #6EE7B7), animated progress bars, and disclaimer text.
passed_tests: Backend: signal_strength_summary contains strong, moderate, weak arrays and total_signals
Backend: Each signal item has key, name, desc, intensity (0-1 float), strength, explanation fields
Backend: Moderate signals correctly categorized (0.25 <= intensity < 0.55)
Backend: total_signals count matches sum of all tier arrays
Backend: Signal descriptions use non-accusatory pattern-based language
Backend: New sessions without data return valid empty signal_strength_summary
Frontend: Each signal shows name ({s.name}), intensity percentage ({Math.round(s.intensity * 100)}%), animated progress bar, and description ({s.desc})
Frontend: Disclaimer text at bottom of section says 'patterns observed in your responses, not conclusions'
Frontend: Signal Strength section renders at stage 6 (revealStage >= 6 check)
Frontend: Linting passes with no errors
Backend: Linting passes with no errors
critical_code_review_comments: Backend server.py lines 596-689: generate_signal_strength_summary() function correctly computes composite intensity from signals dict + change_data weights + core answer detection
Backend SIGNAL_META dict (lines 596-609) provides human-readable names and non-accusatory descriptions for all signal types
Backend STRENGTH_LABELS dict (lines 611-615) provides tier-specific explanations
Frontend ResultsDashboard.jsx lines 722-856: Signal Strength Summary section correctly renders all three tiers with proper styling
Frontend uses motion.div for animated progress bars with width based on s.intensity * 100%
Frontend disclaimer text (lines 848-851) emphasizes 'patterns observed' and 'perceptions, not conclusions'
seed_data_creation: Used pre-existing session 74389d33-3604-422f-af6f-9240b5df74fe with full analysis data. Also created new session 96a5118e-b924-4a4b-8400-1405aaf6bc91 with 5 core questions answered for signal generation testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Signal Strength Summary feature fully functional. Backend API at https://relationship-pulse-7.preview.emergentagent.com/api/analysis/{session_id}/results returns signal_strength_summary field. Test file: /app/backend/tests/test_signal_strength_summary.py (9 tests). Pre-existing session with full data: 74389d33-3604-422f-af6f-9240b5df74fe. Frontend ResultsDashboard.jsx shows Signal Strength Summary at stage 6 (after ~6 seconds of reveal animation). The stage progression: 0=loading, 1=analysis-sequence, 2=suspicion-score, 3=hearts, 4=diagnosis, 5=patterns, 6=signal-strength, 7=perception, 8=perspective, 9=comparison, 10=timeline, 11=actions, 12=complete.
